Quick answer

Piraeus is best for Island hoppers, Seafood lovers, Budget travelers.

Piraeus is a port & ferries area with 3 tracked hotels averaging about €85/night. In this dataset, 0 hotels show an Acropolis-view signal and 0 hotels show a rooftop-bar signal. The lowest tracked nightly price signal is €75 at Phidias Hotel.

Compare hotels Booking notes FAQs

About Piraeus

Athens' historic port city. Perfect for early ferry departures to the islands. Seafood restaurants along the marina and authentic Greek atmosphere.

MaritimeAuthenticPractical
Best for: Island hoppers, Seafood lovers, Budget travelers

What to Know Before Booking in Piraeus

Best-fit traveler

Piraeus works especially well for island hoppers, seafood lovers, budget travelers. If that is not your trip style, compare nearby alternatives before booking.

Price signal

The tracked Piraeus hotels average about €85 per night, with actual rates changing by date, room type, and cancellation policy.

Location signal

Piraeus is listed as 30 min (metro) from the Acropolis in this dataset. Confirm the exact hotel address and transit route before booking.

FAQs: Staying in Piraeus

Is Piraeus a good area to stay in Athens?

Yes. Piraeus is athens' historic port city. It is especially useful for island hoppers, seafood lovers, budget travelers.

How far is Piraeus from the Acropolis?

Piraeus is 30 min (metro) walk from the Acropolis. Piraeus is listed as 30 min (metro) from the Acropolis in the Hotels of Athens neighborhood data. Exact walking time depends on the individual hotel address and entrance used.

What's the average hotel price in Piraeus?

Hotels in Piraeus average around €85 per night. Tracked hotels in Piraeus average around €85 per night, with the visible dataset spanning 3 options. Confirm live rates before booking.
